ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses are contextually relevant and consistent with the scholar persona but could be more natural in tone to improve overall quality.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>The response lacks direct relevance to urgency, which is crucial for a Scholar's persona and context; it also misses the opportunity to engage with natural dialogue.
"Balanced response, maintains persona and context relevance while being natural in tone."
